.file-embed.background: rgba(249, 55, 89, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(41, 41, 41) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(243, 155, 160) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(243, 155, 160) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(243, 155, 160) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgba(249, 55, 89, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(249, 55, 89) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead.background: rgba(243, 155, 160, 0.68) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
